title: Ship Agent Configuration
description: Schema for .ship/agents/<id>.jsonc — an agent definition that controls identity, skills, MCP servers, plugins, permissions, hooks, rules, and provider settings.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Currently '1'. Used for forward-compatible migrations.

id.description: Machine identifier. Must match the filename stem (e.g. rust-compiler.jsonc has id rust-compiler).

description.description: What this agent does — shown in `ship agents` and editor UI.

tags.description: Searchable tags for registry discovery (e.g. workflow, review, testing, frontend).

providers.description: Provider targets for this agent. Overrides the project-level providers list.

model.description: Model override for this agent. Compiled to the provider's model field (e.g. model in .claude/settings.json, model.name in .gemini/settings.json, model in .codex/config.toml).

refs.description: Skill IDs to activate. Supports local IDs (e.g. tdd) and namespaced IDs (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/skill-name).

mcp.description: MCP server activation for this agent.

servers.description: MCP server IDs to activate from .ship/mcp.jsonc.

plugins.description: Plugin installation intent. The compiler emits a manifest; the CLI executes the installs.

install.description: Plugin IDs to install, e.g. superpowers@claude-plugins-official.

scope.description: Installation scope. project installs locally, user installs globally.

permissions.description: Permission overrides. Merged on top of the named preset from permissions.jsonc.

preset.description: Named permission preset — must match a key in .ship/permissions.jsonc. Defines the base permission tier.

tools_allow.description: Tool patterns to allow. Merged on top of the preset's allow list.

tools_deny.description: Tool patterns to deny. Merged on top of the preset's deny list.

tools_ask.description: Tool patterns requiring user confirmation. Merged on top of the preset's ask list.

rules.description: Inline rules appended to the context file after .ship/rules/*.md files.

inline.description: Inline always-on rules. Use \n for line breaks.

provider_settings.description: Per-agent provider-specific overrides. Merged on top of project-level provider_defaults from ship.jsonc (agent wins on conflict, deep merge). Keys are provider names. Values validated against upstream provider schemas, with Ship-managed keys excluded (use Ship's own fields for model, permissions, env, hooks, etc.).

claude.description: Claude Code settings pass-through. Ship-managed keys (permissions, hooks, model, env, availableModels, maxCostPerSession, maxTurns, autoMemoryEnabled) must be set via Ship's own fields.

codex.description: Codex CLI config pass-through. Ship-managed keys (model, mcp_servers) must be set via Ship's own fields.

gemini.description: Gemini CLI settings pass-through. Ship-managed keys (model, hooks, mcpServers) must be set via Ship's own fields.

cursor.description: Cursor settings. No upstream schema published.

opencode.description: OpenCode config pass-through. Ship-managed keys (model, mcp, permission) must be set via Ship's own fields.

ToolPattern.description: A tool permission pattern. Syntax: bare tool name (Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep), parameterized tool (Bash(git *), Bash(rm -rf *)), MCP tool (mcp__<server>__<tool>, e.g. mcp__ship__create_job), or glob (mcp__*__delete*, Bash(*)).
